# Tables

## Table 4

**Fatty acid compositions in total TAG and at the TAG sn-2 position (mole percentages) from rice, soybean, walnut, hazelnut, olive, and sunﬂower oils**

|                                 |      | P    | Po  | St   | O    | L    | Ln   | A   | B   |
| ------------------------------- | ---- | ---- | --- | ---- | ---- | ---- | ---- | --- | --- |
| Rice                            | TAG  | 14.5 | 0.2 | 2.5  | 44.2 | 36.2 | 1.2  | 0.9 | 0.4 |
|                                 | sn-2 | 1.3  | 0.2 | 0.7  | 46.3 | 47.4 | 2.1  | —   | —   |
| Soybean                         | TAG  | 11.3 | 0.1 | 3.6  | 30.5 | 48.8 | 4.7  | 0.4 | 0.6 |
|                                 | sn-2 | 1.2  | 0.8 | 0.6  | 31.7 | 59.8 | 4.1  | —   | —   |
| Walnut                          | TAG  | 7.3  | —   | 3.0  | 14.1 | 62.6 | 12.9 | —   | —   |
|                                 | sn-2 | 0.9  | —   | 0.6  | 15.3 | 7.0  | 11.7 | —   | —   |
| Hazelnut                        | TAG  | 5.2  | 0.1 | 1.6  | 74.8 | 18.3 | 0.1  | —   | —   |
|                                 | sn-2 | 0.7  | —   | 0.7  | 68.5 | 27.9 | 0.9  | —   | —   |
| Olive                           | TAG  | 14.3 | 1.3 | 4.0  | 64.3 | 14.3 | 1.0  | 0.7 | —   |
|                                 | sn-2 | 1.3  | 1.3 | 0.7  | 75.6 | 18.0 | 1.0  | —   | —   |
| Sunﬂower (RHA-274)              | TAG  | 7.4  | —   | 5.8  | 37.3 | 48.4 | —    | 0.2 | 0.9 |
|                                 | sn-2 | 0.6  | —   | 0.6  | 40.8 | 58.0 | —    | —   | —   |
| Sunﬂower (high stearic) (CAS-3) | TAG  | 7.3  | —   | 27.8 | 16.5 | 45.0 | —    | 1.6 | 1.5 |
|                                 | sn-2 | 0.7  | —   | 1.6  | 32.4 | 65.4 | —    | —   | —   |

* **A**: arachidic acid
* **B**: behenic acid
* **L**: linolenic acid
* **Ln**: linolenic acid
* **O**: oleic acid
* **P**: palmitic acid
* **Po**: palmitoleic acid
* **St**: stearic acid
